entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (19) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE LABOR RATES AND CATEGORIES FOR CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-11-D-0012.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (1) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO ADD KEY SUBCONTRACTORS TO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (20) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE IDIQ - SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT (HCERA) OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION 20 - ADD THE FOLLOWING SUBCONTRACTORS TO THE MOHELA TEAM: - SOUTH CAROLINA STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION (EDMANAGE) - COLLEGE FOUNDATION, INC. (EDGEUCATION) - COUNCIL FOR SOUTH TEXAS ECONOMIC PROGRESS (COSTEP)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (21) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE IDIQ: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID SERVICING, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION: TO INCORPORATE THE FINAL PORTFOLIO TRANSFER PLAN IN ORDER TO RECIEVE BORROWER ACCOUNT PORTFOLIO FROM NEW TEAM MEMBERS (FORMER CP SERVICERS).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (22) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
"CRITICAL FUNCTION"
BASE AWARD - SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD 8 ADDITIONAL PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP), IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (25) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITCAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REMOVE THE TAILORED VERSION OF 52.232-18 AVAILABILITY OF FUNDS (APR 1984) AND REPLACE WITH THE STANDARD VERSION OF THE CLAUSE; AND TO REMOVE AND REPLACE THE TERM FOUND IN SECTION B.12.O.16.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
